name: JoAi: Pause or Resume Scheduled Task

title.en: Pause or resume a scheduled task
title.es: Pause or resume a scheduled task
title.fr: Pause or resume a scheduled task
title.ro: Pause or resume a scheduled task
title.it: Pause or resume a scheduled task

description.en: Pause an active scheduled task or resume a paused one.
description.de: Pausiere eine aktive geplante Aufgabe oder setze eine pausierte fort.
description.es: Pause an active scheduled task or resume a paused one.
description.fr: Pause an active scheduled task or resume a paused one.
description.ro: Pause an active scheduled task or resume a paused one.
description.it: Pause an active scheduled task or resume a paused one.

bot: Use this when the user wants to pause, unpause, resume, enable, or disable a scheduled task. The task ID is required — if the user doesn't provide one, list tasks first to find it.

inputs.name: Task ID

description.en: The ID of the scheduled task to pause or resume
description.de: Die ID der zu pausierenden oder fortzusetzenden Aufgabe
description.es: The ID of the scheduled task to pause or resume
description.fr: The ID of the scheduled task to pause or resume
description.ro: The ID of the scheduled task to pause or resume
description.it: The ID of the scheduled task to pause or resume

inputs.bot: The task hash ID. If the user refers to a task by name or description, list tasks first to find the matching ID.
